creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 208998
Update to 5.0.1 with_emoji

japanese/font-cica was marked as BROKEN due to unfetchable.
This is already updated to 5.0.1 upstream and is fetchable.
Sync to upstream not to be deleted.

Note that I chose with_emoji one, while there is without_emoji one.
This is because Japanese codeset is already large enough and difference of size is relatively small.

If anyone who want without_emoji one, please add OPTION to select whichever user wants.
